title = "No Heading Level Jumps"
weight = 40
+++

<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: markdown_no_heading_level_jumps`

## Purpose

Disallow jumps larger than one heading level (for example `H1 -> H3`).

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: markdown_no_heading_level_jumps
```
